propensity_dimensions.label: Gamification Engagement
propensity_dimensions.description: Reward accumulation and habit streak — log-normalized to reduce zero-inflation skew

propensity_dimensions.label: AI Tutor Usage
propensity_dimensions.description: Active AI-guided practice: smoothed tutor usage signal + exercise depth

propensity_dimensions.label: Leaderboard & Competition
propensity_dimensions.description: Competitive engagement: smoothed leaderboard signal using norm_days (not sessions, no leakage)

D0.default: Welcome to SpeakX! Start your journey to speaking confidence today. Your first lesson awaits!
D0.gamification: Welcome! Earn your first streak & coins today. Let's build a habit!
D0.ai_tutor: Welcome! Ready to speak? Try your 1-on-1 AI Tutor session now for instant feedback.
D0.leaderboard: Welcome! See how you rank. Start your first lesson & climb the leaderboard!
D0.social: Welcome! Join our community of learners. Start your first lesson & connect!

D1.default: Great start! Keep practicing to build confidence. Your next personalized lesson is ready.
D1.gamification: Day 2 streak! Keep it up! More coins await with your next exercise.
D1.ai_tutor: Practice makes perfect! Your AI Tutor is ready for another real-time conversation.
D1.leaderboard: Check the leaderboard! A new challenge awaits. Complete a lesson to earn points.
D1.social: Connect & compete! See how your friends are doing. Practice a lesson today!

D2.default: Consistency is key! A quick practice session today will boost your fluency.
D2.gamification: Don't break your streak! Practice today to keep your habit strong & earn rewards.
D2.ai_tutor: Unlock new phrases! Your AI Tutor has fresh topics for your speaking practice.
D2.leaderboard: Climb higher! Your next lesson could put you ahead on the leaderboard. Go!
D2.social: Inspire others! Share your progress & see who's leading. Practice now!

D3.default: Feeling more confident? Keep going! Your personalized curriculum adapts to you.
D3.gamification: 3-day streak! Amazing! Keep earning coins & building your speaking habit.
D3.ai_tutor: Refine your pronunciation! Get instant voice analytics from your AI Tutor session.
D3.leaderboard: New week, new ranks! Challenge yourself to reach the top. Practice today!
D3.social: See who's speaking! Check the leaderboard & join the conversation. Practice!

D4.default: Almost a week! Regular practice is transforming your speaking skills. Keep it up!
D4.gamification: Your streak is growing! Don't miss out on daily rewards. Practice now!
D4.ai_tutor: Dive deeper! Your AI Tutor is ready for advanced conversation topics.
D4.leaderboard: The top spots are calling! Complete more lessons to boost your rank.
D4.social: Connect with fellow learners! See their progress & share your own. Practice!

D5.default: Notice your progress? Voice analytics can show you how far you've come!
D5.gamification: Keep that streak alive! More practice means more coins & better speaking.
D5.ai_tutor: Ready for a challenge? Your AI Tutor has new scenarios to test your fluency.
D5.leaderboard: Push your limits! A few more lessons could secure your spot on the board.
D5.social: Who's leading the pack? Check the leaderboard & get inspired to practice!

D6.default: One more day to a full week! Your dedication is paying off. Practice today!
D6.gamification: Almost a 7-day streak! Don't lose it now. Practice to earn your weekly bonus!
D6.ai_tutor: Your AI Tutor is always ready. Get real-time feedback to perfect your speech.
D6.leaderboard: Weekend challenge! Can you reach the top 10? Practice & earn points!
D6.social: Weekend practice! See who's online & join the learning fun. Speak up!

D7.default: Congratulations on a week of practice! Ready to unlock premium features?
D7.gamification: 7-day streak achieved! Claim your bonus coins & keep the habit going!
D7.ai_tutor: Mastered the basics? Unlock premium AI Tutor features for advanced practice.
D7.leaderboard: Weekly leaderboard reset! Start strong this week. Practice to dominate!
D7.social: Celebrate your week! See who else hit a 7-day streak. Keep practicing!

D8.default: Welcome to premium! Unlock advanced lessons & unlimited AI Tutor sessions.
D8.at_risk: We miss you! Re-engage with premium features. Your progress awaits.
D8.gamification: Premium perks! Your streak bonus is bigger now. Keep practicing daily!
D8.ai_tutor: Unlimited AI Tutor sessions are yours! Dive into deeper conversations.
D8.leaderboard: Premium power! Your scores now count more. Climb the global leaderboard!
D8.social: Connect with premium users! Share tips & compete for top spots. Practice!

D10.default: Keep up the great work! Your personalized curriculum is adapting to your growth.
D10.gamification: Your streak is a testament to your dedication! Keep it going for more rewards.
D10.ai_tutor: Explore new topics with your AI Tutor. Perfect your fluency with unlimited practice.
D10.leaderboard: Challenge yourself! Aim for a higher rank this week. Practice & earn points.
D10.social: See how others are progressing! Share your wins & get inspired. Practice!

D15.default: Halfway through the month! How's your speaking confidence growing?
D15.gamification: Mid-month streak check! Keep your habit strong & your coins growing.
D15.ai_tutor: Advanced voice analytics are ready! See your detailed progress with AI Tutor.
D15.leaderboard: Mid-month push! Can you break into the top tier? Practice to find out!
D15.social: Connect with top learners! See their strategies & boost your own practice.

D20.default: You're making amazing progress! Keep refining your speech with daily practice.
D20.gamification: Your consistent streak is impressive! Keep earning those premium bonuses.
D20.ai_tutor: New AI Tutor scenarios released! Practice real-world conversations today.
D20.leaderboard: Final sprint! The monthly leaderboard is heating up. Practice to win!
D20.social: Share your progress! Inspire others & see who's leading the charge. Practice!

D25.default: Almost a full month of premium! Your speaking skills are truly evolving.
D25.gamification: Your streak is a superpower! Keep it active for end-of-month rewards.
D25.ai_tutor: One last push! Maximize your AI Tutor sessions before the month ends.
D25.leaderboard: Last chance to climb! The monthly leaderboard closes soon. Practice hard!
D25.social: Final push! See who's making a last-minute climb. Practice & connect!

D30.default: Congratulations on a month of premium! Your speaking confidence is soaring.

D30.ai_tutor: Celebrate your progress! Your AI Tutor is ready for your next challenge.

D30.social: New month, new goals! Connect with friends & set your next speaking challenge.

D30.default: We miss you! Your speaking journey doesn't have to end. Rejoin SpeakX Premium!
D30.gamification: Don't let your premium streak bonuses be forgotten! Rejoin to continue.

D30.social: Your friends miss you! Reconnect with the SpeakX community & premium features.

default.primary_goal: Complete your first AI tutor session and build a 3-day streak.

leaderboard.primary_goal: View the leaderboard and complete 5 exercises to earn points.

social.primary_goal: View the leaderboard and invite a friend to join SpeakX.

default.primary_goal: Maintain a consistent learning habit and explore advanced premium features.

at_risk.primary_goal: Complete an AI Tutor session and check your progress with voice analytics.

gamification.primary_goal: Maintain a 30-day streak and achieve a top 10 leaderboard rank.

leaderboard.primary_goal: Achieve a top 5 rank on the global leaderboard and complete 20 exercises.

social.primary_goal: Engage with the leaderboard and share your progress on social media.

default.primary_goal: Re-activate premium subscription and complete one AI Tutor session.
